mapper.insert:
insert into agent_definition(id, name, definition_desc, first_principle, second_rule, third_skill, model, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time, status, reserver, remark) values
(#{entity.id}, #{entity.name}, #{entity.definitionDesc}, #{entity.firstPrinciple}, #{entity.secondRule}, #{entity.thirdSkill}, #{entity.model}, #{entity.createBy}, #{entity.updateBy}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.reserver}, #{entity.remark})
